edge_case_flags: All user interactions are hesitant, indicating intrigue but lack of absolute certainty.
User rejected generic 'Organic Growth' (Reject 4) but accepted a high-fidelity 'Digital terrarium' (Accept 8), suggesting execution and aesthetic fidelity matter more than the raw concept.

scout_assignments.reason: Needs to determine if the user prefers tactile, earthly textures like paper and plants, or sleek, abstract physics like liquid and space.
Must test whether the user wants to see individual transactions represented as distinct objects, or if they prefer a single aggregated mass representing overall financial health.
Needs to push the boundary of 'Atmospheric Contemplation' to see if the user requires any functional utility at all, or if pure ambient art is the goal.

persona_anima_divergence: While the user explicitly stated they want an app that 'doesn't feel like a spreadsheet', their rejections of gamification reveal they also do not want a standard 'app' experience. They are seeking a completely numberless, ambient, and artistic visualization of their life, prioritizing emotional resonance over financial utility.
